query: ok received the render from the architect for the new tower in vila madalena, its a lobby shot but feels really sterile and empty. can you help me write a prompt to make it feel more brazilian and lived-in? im going to run it through nano banana
tenho um render aqui da varanda gourmet do projeto da liege, precisa ficar com cara de revista, brasileiro, com pessoas reais usando o espaço. me da um prompt pra eu rodar no nano banana
ImageEnhancerAIOS turn this rooftop pool render into something a buyer in jardins would actually want to live at. preserve everything, just add brazilian life

the marketing team needs this academia/wellness studio render to feel less like an institutional gym and more like a high-end residential amenity. its an empty space right now, can you write the edit prompt? attached
i have 4 renders to humanize for the catarina project — facade, lobby, party room, and rooftop pool. lets start with the lobby (i'll send the image). same brazilian editorial style across all
render do living tá tudo mobiliado mas tá vazio de gente. queria adicionar familia tomando café da tarde estilo editorial brasileiro. me ajuda com o prompt pro nano banana, mantendo a câmera
this exterior shot of the building has the camera angle locked perfect, just need brazilian-market cars and pedestrians, not european ones. write me a nano banana edit prompt
fresh render from kingstone for the gym amenity at the icaraí building. need yoga people, brazilian residents, dont change the architecture or equipment layout. write the prompt
got a churrasqueira shot here that needs people grilling, drinks at the bar area, maybe a chef. preserve the layout exactly, just add life. nano banana prompt please

i'm presenting to the ludmila client tomorrow morning and this rooftop render has zero atmosphere — totally empty, no people, no plants enhanced. can you generate me the edit prompt to send through nano banana with brazilian lifestyle styling?
can you generate a logo for our new real estate brand 'Habita Coliving'? something modern in terracotta tones, ideally vector format with a clean wordmark
i need to optimize the file size of these construction site photos before uploading to the dropbox client portal. they're around 8mb each and the client is on slow internet
write a property listing for this 3-bedroom apartment in moema. 95m2, sun-facing, balcony with city view, just renovated wooden floors. portuguese please, with brazilian luxury market tone
converting a classy closets cad pdf into a higgsfield render prompt. its a master walk-in closet with built-in cabinetry. need the analyst director to review the dimensions first
make a 15-second instagram reel from this 8-image carousel of the icaraí project — kling i2v, brazilian samba background music, slow camera movement
search for the most recent commits on the cabinet-pdf-to-prompts skill, i need to know what changed in the last week. specifically looking for director_lessons updates
convert these arch viz renders from .tiff to .jpg with maximum quality preservation, target around 2mb per file. batch the whole folder if possible
i need to write the technical specs for our parking garage waterproofing on this report. ABNT-compliant format, references to NBR 9575 and current 2026 standards
create a 3d sketchup model of this lobby from the floor plan im sending. need it for the architect meeting friday, just blocky volumes is fine
the render i sent earlier needs to be cropped to 16:9 for the meta ads campaign and also a square version for instagram feed. can you crop and resize it for me?
